keys.description: Per-tenant chargeback list results with a filter hash suffix. Read hot on admin dashboards. Invalidated on any chargeback state transition.
Single chargeback full row + parent payment/invoice/dispute/transaction/fee_transaction/refund/latest_evidence. Read by admin UI + defenders' detail view.

Auto-collected evidence bundle from CollectChargebackEvidenceJob. NOT persisted to chargeback_evidence table — admin reviews the draft + submits via POST /chargebacks/{chargeback}/evidence (which persists a new row). 30d TTL because chargeback evidence deadlines are up to 45 days (Mastercard MDMP).
Pending-evidence queue for a tenant. Feeds the SDUI pending-evidence screen + the tenant.{id}.chargebacks.pending-evidence broadcast channel's initial payload.
List of user_ids holding chargebacks.submit-evidence permission for a tenant. Read by NotifyChargebackEvidenceOverdueJob to seed reminder notifications. Invalidated on permission changes.
All ChargebackEvidence rows for a specific chargeback (all submission attempts). Read by SDUI evidence viewer + chargeback detail.
Current sequence number for ChargebackNumberGenerator per-tenant per-year. Auto-incremented on chargeback_number allocation. NEVER expires — persists across process restarts.
invalidatedBy: yearly boundary (natural rollover — new sequence per year)

keys.description: Rolling 60-day chargeback rate per tenant per network. Computed by MonitorChargebackRateJob nightly. Read by chargeback-rate report + rate-alert dashboard. Invalidated when the rate re-computes.
Cached chargeback-rate report response. period_key = period_start-period_end in ISO 8601. Powers the /reports/chargeback-rate endpoint's non-hot path.

The reason-code catalogue loaded from data/reason-code-catalog.json. Read on every chargeback create to validate reason_code + derive reason_category + reason_description. Refreshed on config publish.
invalidatedBy: config publish (manual admin action — new reason codes rare)

keys.description: In-progress CheckChargebackStatusJob run state per provider. Prevents concurrent runs. run_key = timestamp bucket.
